title: Plasma

prompt_text:
# Plasma

OGL WebGL2 fluid plasma shader with turbulent swirling colors and mouse-position reactive distortion, suitable as a full-bleed animated background.

## Use when
- Adding a vibrant, eye-catching animated background to a dark landing page.
- Creating a playful, energetic atmosphere for a brand or product showcase.
- Using as an ambient background decoration that evolves without user interaction.

## Stack
- Framework: react
- Libraries: ogl

## Install
```bash
npm install ogl
```

## Component — plasma.tsx
```tsx
// Source: animations_011.md
// Export: Plasma (default)
// Props: className, style
// Uses OGL Renderer (WebGL2), Program, Mesh, Triangle
// Custom fluid simulation fragment shader with mouse-reactive distortion uniform
// See full source in raw/animations_011.md
```

## Notes
- Requires OGL and WebGL2 support. Lazy-load for performance.
